name: allium-lsp
description: Language Server Protocol server for the Allium language.

scripts.build: esbuild src/bin.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --external:allium-parser-wasm --outfile=dist/bin.js --define:require.main=undefined && chmod +x dist/bin.js && cp ../../packages/allium-parser-wasm/allium_wasm.js ../../packages/allium-parser-wasm/allium_wasm_bg.wasm dist/
